title: ukia's hoes
description:
Hoes like no other. Improved Stardew Valley style hoes, which actually look like hoes rather than weird scythe things. Cozier cozy cottagecore hoes for farming. Make your tools more tool!
!COPPER HOE!
body:
Improved Stardew Valley style hoes, which actually look like hoes rather than weird scythe things. Cozier, cozy hoes for farming, regular hoes can't compare to these. Cute cottage core hoes.

I also made a retexture of copper tools with oxidization that match the ingot better and look less flat/washed-out and it's compatable with this one!

If the model is broken, ensure another pack's hoe JSON isn't interfering. Culprit in testing was Vanilla Tweaks item model fix I believe.
![copper hoe.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1902192a984dee4b8144bdeb0724516ac88688bd.png)
